# Hardcoded-Color Audit & Recommendations

**Generated by:** `node scripts/audit-hardcoded-colors.mjs` ‚Üí `data/hardcoded-colors.json`
**Standard:** ZERO hardcoded colors outside `themes.css` ‚Äî every color a theme variable so the theme system owns the palette.

## Headline

| Metric | Count |
|---|---:|
| **Bare literals** (unthemed colors) | **1,244** |
| `var(--x, #lit)` fallbacks (themed; literal is only a fallback) | 516 |
| Files affected | 110 |

The `css-oop-compliance` gate currently passes ‚Äî so it is **not catching these**. That's the first gap to close.

## Most-used bare literals ‚Üí recommended theme variable

These map **directly** to existing theme tokens (mechanical, safe codemod):

| Literal | Count | ‚Üí Replace with |
|---|---:|---|
| `white` / `#fff` | 139 | `var(--text-on-accent)` (text on color) or a new `--color-white` |
| `#6366f1` | 30 | `var(--primary)` (themes `--primary-rgb: 99,102,241`) |
| `#ef4444` / `#f87171` | 36 | `var(--danger-color)` |
| `#22c55e` / `#4ade80` | 26 | `var(--success-color)` |
| `#3b82f6` | 10 | `var(--info-color)` |
| `#f59e0b` | 9 | `var(--warning-color)` |

These need **new semantic tokens** (there is no theme var today, so they can't be mechanically mapped):

| Literal family | Count (approx) | ‚Üí Add token |
|---|---:|---|
| `rgba(0,0,0,Œ±)` (scrims, shadows) | ~110 | `--overlay-dark` / `--shadow-color` set |
| `rgba(255,255,255,Œ±)` (glass, hovers) | ~90 | `--overlay-light` / `--glass` set |
| neutral grays `#333`, `#94a3b8`, `#e2e8f0` | ~70 | map to `--bg-*` / `--text-*` / `--border-color` |

## Worst offenders (fix in priority order)

**Framework (high-visibility ‚Äî fix first):**
- `src/styles/site.css` ‚Äî 101
- `src/styles/behaviors/*.css` ‚Äî audio.css 88, hero.css 32, navbar.css 28, progress.css 16, card.css 8
- `src/wb-viewmodels/card.js` ‚Äî 30 bare (but 111 fallbacks ‚Äî already mostly themed)
- `src/wb-viewmodels/media.js` 97, `semantics/audio.js` 93, `effects.js` 38, `overlay.js` 17

**Lower priority (dev tools / demos / page-specific):**
- `src/styles/pages/ai-permutation-test.css` ‚Äî 216 (one throwaway test page ‚Äî biggest single count, lowest value)
- `src/core/wb-devconsole.js` 37, `error-logger.js` 25, `events.js` 24, `api/setup.js` 33 (dev/diagnostic UI)
- `src/styles/code-themes/*` ‚Äî grayscale code themes (arguably *are* a palette; may be exempt like themes.css)

## Recommendations

1. **Add the missing semantic tokens to `themes.css`** so scrims/glass/shadows become themeable:
   `--overlay-dark`, `--overlay-light`, `--glass-bg`, `--shadow-color` (and confirm `--text-on-accent`).
2. **Codemod the direct brand maps** (`#6366f1‚Üí--primary`, `#ef4444‚Üí--danger-color`, ‚Ä¶). Mechanical and safe ‚Äî a follow-up script keyed off `data/hardcoded-colors.json`.
3. **Manual pass for neutrals/grays** ‚Äî context-dependent (bg vs text vs border); can't be blindly mapped.
4. **Strengthen the gate:** extend `css-oop-compliance` (or add `no-hardcoded-colors-src`) to flag BARE literals in `src/**` using `audit-hardcoded-colors.mjs` ‚Äî it misses 1,244 today. Ratchet: fail the build on any *new* bare literal, burn down the backlog by file.
5. **Exempt intentional palettes:** `themes.css` (already) and the `code-themes/*` syntax palettes ‚Äî decide and encode the allowlist.
6. **Quick wins first:** `hero.css` (32 ‚Äî my recent cardhero work; convert its `hsl()`/scrim literals to the new `--overlay-*` tokens) and `site.css` (101) are the highest-visibility framework files.

## Effort estimate

- Mechanical (direct brand maps + tokens): ~40% of the 1,244 ‚Üí scriptable in an afternoon.
- Manual (neutrals, context): ~50% ‚Üí per-file review.
- Exempt/defer (code-themes, one-off test page): ~10%.

Re-run `node scripts/audit-hardcoded-colors.mjs` after each pass to watch the count fall.
